name: Crimson Furnace
descriptionTemplate: Consume all {Crimson Furnace}, restore [Heal:Arg1] HP. Can accumulate up to [Arg2] {Crimson Furnace}.

Arg1.displayFormula: stored Crimson Furnace healing * (1 - Lost HP %)

Arg2.displayFormula: Base cap is 25% Max HP, plus flat Crimson Furnace cap bonuses, then multiplied by Crimson Furnace cap %. If Propagation: Caro is active, the base Max HP cap is doubled to 50% before those bonuses.
